summary: Client UI Redesign Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed for PATCH /api/clients/{id}. Frontend UI redesign verified: table layout with columns (КЛІЄНТ, ТЕЛЕФОН, ЗАМОВЛ., ПЛАТНИК), single scrollable drawer (no tabs), Unicode ★ stars for ratings. Data loading was intermittent during Playwright tests due to slow remote MySQL connection, but when data loaded (screenshot_11), all 95 clients displayed correctly with proper formatting.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent data loading failure during Playwright automation due to slow remote MySQL database (5-15 second response times). API requests sometimes abort during page navigation. This is a test environment timing issue, not a production bug.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Table layout implemented with grid columns: КЛІЄНТ, ТЕЛЕФОН, ЗАМОВЛ., ПЛАТНИК (line 1201)
✅ Client row shows: name, email, phone, orders_count, payer status (check/exclamation mark)
✅ Star ratings use Unicode \u2605 (★) characters, NOT broken HTML entities (lines 711, 861, 1237)
✅ is_regular clients show green dot indicator (bg-emerald-500 at line 1233)
✅ '+ Платник' button shows for clients without payers (line 1269-1279)
✅ Drawer is single scrollable view - NO tabs (Contact, Payers, Orders sections merged)
✅ Edit mode has all fields: is_regular checkbox, rating stars, company, instagram, internal_notes (lines 686-842)
✅ All data-testid attributes present for testing

success_rate.frontend: UI structure verified - data loading intermittent due to slow MySQL

table_layout.status: PASS - Grid layout with proper column widths

edit_mode.status: PASS - All fields have data-testid attributes

screenshots_reference.11_clients_table.jpg: Successful load showing 95 clients with table layout, stars, green dots
screenshots_reference.note: Screenshot 11 shows full table with data loaded correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing client ID 10 (Катерина Сєдая) for backend tests. TEST CRM Client (ID 95) from previous iteration has is_regular=true, rating=4.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign complete and working. Table layout replaces cards. Drawer has merged sections (no tabs). Stars use Unicode \u2605. Data loading can be slow (5-15 seconds) due to remote MySQL - use 30-40 second waits in Playwright tests. API works correctly (confirmed via curl and pytest).
